sections.paragraph:
σκηνόω (σκηνή) fut. σκηνώσω; 1 aor. ἐσκήνωσα (X., Pla. et al.; LXX; Jos., Vi. 244, Ant. 3, 293) live, settle, take up residence (X., Demosth. 54, 3; SIG 344, 3; PSI 340, 10; 13 [III b.c.]; LXX) w. ἐν and the dat. of place (X., An. 5, 5, 11; PEdg 68 [=Sb 6774], 7; Gen 13:12) ἐν τ. οὐρανῷ Rv 13:6; cp. 12:12 ἐν ἡμῖν among us (perh. an expression of continuity with God’s ‘tenting’ in Israel) J 1:14 (Iren. 1, 9, 2 [Harv. I 82, 9]; Diogenes, Ep. 37, 1 παρὰ τούτοις ἐσκήνωσα=‘I took up residence w. them’). μετʼ αὐτῶν with them Rv 21:3. ἐπʼ αὐτούς over or above them, i.e. shelter them, of God (s. σκηνή 1bα) 7:15.—DELG s.v. σκηνή. M-M. TW.

fut. fut. = fut.

aor. aor. = aorist

  1. X. = Xenophon, V–IV b.c.—List 5

Pla Pla , V–IV b.c.; s. also Ps.-Plato—List 5

et al. et al. = et alii (and others)

LXX LXX = Septuaginta, ed. ARahlfs, unless otherwise specified—Lists 2, beg.

Jos. Jos. = Josephus. This abbr. used when follow by title; I a.d.—Lists 5

Demosth Demosth , IV b.c.—List 5

SIG SIG = Sylloge Inscriptionum Graecarum3; superscript omitted in text—List 3

PSI PSI = Papiri greci e latini: Pubblicazioni della Società Italiana—List 4

dat. dat. = dative

PEdg PEdg = CDE., Selected Papyri—List 4

Sb Sb = Sammelbuch griechischer Urkunden aus Aegypten—Lists 3, 4

  1. cp. = compare, freq. in ref. to citation fr. ancient texts

perh. perh. = perhaps

Iren. Iren. = Irenaeus, Haereses, II a.d.—List 5

Harv. Harv. = WHarvey; s. Iren.—List 5

Diogenes Diogenes = letters attributed to the philosopher D. of Sinope; date uncertain—List 5

Ep.

Ep. = Epistola/Epistula, when applied to letters mostly pseudonymous; various dates—List 5

  1. = epistle

i.e.

i.e. = id est (that is)

I.-E. Indo-European

DELG DELG = PChantraine, Dictionnaire étymologique de la langue grecque—List 6

s.v. s.v. = sub voce (under the word, look up the word)

M-M M-M = JMoulton/GMilligan, Vocabulary of Greek Testament—Lists 4, 6

TW TW = Theologisches Wörterbuch zum NT; tr. GBromiley, Theological Dictionary of the NT—List 6

Arndt, William ; Danker, Frederick W. ; Bauer, Walter: A Greek-English Lexicon of the New Testament and Other Early Christian Literature. 3rd ed. Chicago : University of Chicago Press, 2000, S. 929
